_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Data development process involves implementing data pipelines, products, services or platforms while ensuring they are secure, scalable, sustainable, reliable and meeting required standards.
reference_document_element_description: Design, build, and maintain data ingestion pipelines from source systems to the data platform, including schema mapping, transformation logic, and error handling.
comments: DDaT skill superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-011 (DA, cosine: 0.548), DA-S-009 (DA, cosine: 0.543).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.5/10 (raw 0.553). Shared vocabulary: [data, pipelines]. DDaT-only terms [development, ensuring, implementing, involves, meeting, platforms] vs WIDAI-only terms [build, design, error, handling, ingestion, logic] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.869 (P=0.866, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 23-word DDaT element and 22-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Data development process involves implementing data pipelines, products, service" and "Design, build, and maintain data ingestion pipelines from source systems to the" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.655 > STS 0.553 (gap +0.102). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, pipelines] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 7.7%. Shared tokens: [data, pipelines]. DDaT-only: [development, ensuring, implementing, involves, meeting, platforms]. WIDAI-only: [build, design, error, handling, ingestion, logic].
